record.field: 🎉 Congratulations! You reached ESG Level {{ object.esg_level }}

div.style: margin: 0px; padding: 0px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;
max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto; background-color: #ffffff; padding: 30px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
div.p: Congratulations on your incredible commitment to sustainability! You have successfully reached Level .

div.style: background-color: #f8fafc; padding: 20px; border-radius: 8px; margin: 25px 0; text-align: center; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;

p.style: font-size: 14px; color: #64748b; font-weight: bold; text-transform: uppercase; margin: 0 0 5px 0;

div.p: You can spend your newly earned points in the Reward Store to claim exclusive company swag or extra time off.

a.style: background-color: #10b981; color: #ffffff; padding: 12px 24px; text-decoration: none; font-weight: bold; border-radius: 6px; display: inline-block;

record.field: Action Required: Please Acknowledge Policy - {{ object.policy_id.name }}

div.style: margin: 0px; padding: 0px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;
max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto; background-color: #ffffff; padding: 30px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
div.p: A new governance policy has been published and requires your review and acknowledgement.

a.style: background-color: #3b82f6; color: #ffffff; padding: 12px 24px; text-decoration: none; font-weight: bold; border-radius: 6px; display: inline-block;
